testcase.name: verify_account_registration
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Your Account Has Been Created!] but found [invalid session id: session deleted as the browser has closed the connection from disconnected: unable to send message to renderer (Session info: MicrosoftEdge=147.0.3912.98) Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.9' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.edge.EdgeDriver Command: [002b4ede86f12aff71fb1bff629f51b4, findElement {using=xpath, value=//h1[contains(text(),'Has Been Created')]}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: MicrosoftEdge, browserVersion: 147.0.3912.98, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:processID: 20408, ms:edgeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:55028}, msedge: {msedgedriverVersion: 147.0.3912.98 (6cae4df1a4ff..., userDataDir: C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Loca...}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:55028/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.3912.98, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 002b4ede86f12aff71fb1bff629f51b4] at testCases.TC001_AccountRegistrationTest.verify_account_registration(TC001_AccountRegistrationTest.java:33) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583) ...
